questions.question: What year was Fortnite Battle Royale released?
questions.explanation: Fortnite Battle Royale launched in September 2017 as a free mode.

questions.question: Which game features an imposter sabotaging a spaceship crew?
questions.explanation: Among Us went viral in 2020, though it was originally released in 2018.

questions.question: Who is the main character in The Witcher 3?
questions.explanation: Geralt of Rivia is the monster hunter protagonist of The Witcher series.

questions.question: What year did GTA V first release?
questions.explanation: GTA V launched in September 2013 and has sold over 200 million copies.

questions.question: Which game features building, mining, and crafting in a blocky world?
questions.explanation: Minecraft, created by Markus 'Notch' Persson, launched fully in 2011.

questions.question: What studio developed Valorant?
questions.explanation: Valorant was developed by Riot Games (also known for League of Legends) in 2020.

questions.question: Which souls-like game was co-created with author George R.R. Martin?
questions.explanation: Elden Ring's world and lore were co-created by FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin.

questions.question: What platform is Roblox primarily known as?
questions.explanation: Roblox is a platform where users create and play games made by other users.

questions.question: Which game won Game of the Year at The Game Awards 2022?
questions.explanation: Elden Ring won GOTY at The Game Awards 2022.

questions.question: In Minecraft, what material do you need to build a Nether Portal?
questions.explanation: You need at least 10 obsidian blocks to build a Nether Portal in Minecraft.

questions.question: What is the maximum number of players in a Fortnite Battle Royale match?
questions.explanation: A standard Fortnite Battle Royale match has 100 players.

questions.question: Which game features the characters Cypher, Jett, and Sage?
questions.explanation: Cypher, Jett, and Sage are agents (characters) in Valorant.

questions.question: What year was the Nintendo Switch released?
questions.explanation: The Nintendo Switch launched in March 2017 as a hybrid home/portable console.

questions.question: Which open world game is set on a post-apocalyptic Earth with robot dinosaurs?
questions.explanation: Horizon Zero Dawn features a world where robotic creatures roam a post-apocalyptic Earth.

questions.question: What is the highest rank in Valorant's competitive mode?
questions.explanation: Radiant is the highest competitive rank in Valorant, reserved for the top 500 players per region.
